nodes.name: Every 10 min
nodes.notes:
Runs every 10 min. Two responsibilities:
1. Detector: find failed outbound sends (email_log / messages_sent / outreach_log) from the last hour that aren't already in the retry queue, enqueue them with exponential-backoff next_retry_at.
2. Worker: pick up queue rows where next_retry_at <= now and status='pending', mark them 'retrying', then... for the MVP we just log the retry intent + flip the lead's outreach_status back so the existing outreach-sender-v2 cron picks it up on its next run. After max_retries, flip to 'permanent_failure' and fire a sentinel_alert.
